differential_diagnoses: Coronary artery disease (with spontaneous coronary artery dissection)
next_steps: Implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) implantation for primary prevention
Serologic testing for Trypanosoma cruzi (e.g., IgG ELISA and confirmatory testing)
Assessment of complete blood count with differential to evaluate for eosinophilia
Cardiac PET/CT scan to assess for active inflammation (sarcoidosis or myocarditis)
Genetic counseling and testing for familial cardiomyopathy
Implantable cardioverter-defibrillator (ICD) implantation for primary prevention
